headline: Sweater weather is here – and so are the cosiest knits
summary: The Austrian village of Stumm showcases the season’s jumpers, cardigans and wraps
body_text:
Esin wears Acne Studios wool knit jumper, £650

Luca wears Hermès cashmere pullover with Décalcomanie print, £3,950, spinnaker canvas shirt (just seen), £850, and leather trousers, £7,500. Prada leather Spazzolato shoes, £890. Esin wears Louis Vuitton felted ribbed wool knit jumper, £1,182, and metallic-thread wool embroidered 3D dress with leather belt, POA. Loewe leather Toy boots, £1,850

Esin wears Talia Byre leather jacket, £945, and matching leather skirt, £730. By Malene Birger wool scarf, £150

Esin wears Renaissance Renaissance wool cardigan, £505. We11done viscose skirt, £100. Loewe leather Toy boots, £1,850. Luca wears Ermenegildo Zegna pure cashmere cardigan, £1,450. Isa Boulder acrylic trousers, £360. Prada leather Spazzolato shoes, £890. Elhanati spinel and malachite necklace, £495

Esin wears Prada suede jacket, £4,350, embroidered satin organza skirt, £5,100, and brushed leather pumps, £1,070. Saks Potts wool knit jumper, £350. Falke wool socks, £30
